items.title: Two US troops killed and one missing after Iranian attack in Jordan
items.summary: Iran and the US have traded strikes as hostilities re-escalated this week, with Tehran targeting US military facilities across the Gulf region.

items.title: Russian online retail warehouses hit by deadly Ukrainian strikes
items.summary: Drones targeted Wildberries facilities near Moscow and in Tambov. Ukraine's leader called them "major logistics facilities" supplying "sanctioned components".

items.title: Hungary's president agrees to stand down after parliament backs removal
items.summary: Tamás Sulyok, seen as an Orbán loyalist, had until Saturday night to agree to end his term.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 伊朗襲擊約旦　五角大廈：2美軍陣亡1人失聯
items.summary: 美國五角大廈今天表示，伊朗對約旦發動一連串飛彈與無人機攻勢後，有兩名美軍人員在約旦陣亡，另有1人失聯。  法新社報導，美軍中央司令部（CENTCOM）說明，兩名軍人是昨天在美軍與夥伴國家部隊...…

items.title: 伊朗最高領袖：美國違反停火協議　川普簽名一文不值
items.summary: 伊朗最高領袖穆吉塔巴．哈米尼今天發布書面聲明表示，美國一再違反由伊朗與美國總統簽署的停火諒解備忘錄，顯示川普的簽名「完全一文不值、毫無公信力」。  路透社報導，美伊兩國停火協議上週破裂後，華...…

items.title: 日本皇位繼承修法仍禁止女天皇  BBC：與民意存在顯著落差
items.summary: 日本國會近日通過放寬皇位繼承的重大法案，但新法案仍禁止女性登基，意味天皇的獨生女愛子內親王依舊無法繼承皇位。然而，這項修法與日本主流民意存在顯著落差，根據《每日新聞》與共同社的最...…
